2605.21858.title: Hypergraph as Language
2605.21858.paper_summary: Large language models (LLMs) have recently shown strong potential in modeling relational structures. However, existing approaches remain fundamentally graph-centric: they focus on processing pairwise graph structures into tokens that LLMs can understand. In contrast, many real-world relational patterns do not naturally conform to the pairwise-edge assumption, and are better modeled as high-order associations in hypergraphs. For hypergraph structures, existing methods often fail to preserve the native semantics that multiple objects are jointly connected by the same high-order relation, limiting their ability to exploit complex structures. To address this limitation, we put forth the "Hypergraph as Language" perspective and propose Hyper-Align, a hypergraph-native alignment framework for large language models. Hyper-Align compiles the query-object-centered hypergraph context into hypergraph tokens directly consumable by a base LLM. Specifically, we introduce Hypergraph Incidence Detail Template with Overview (HIDT-O), which serializes high-order association structures into a fixed-shape hybrid template combining local incidence details and overview-level summaries. We then design a Hypergraph Incidence Projector (HIP), which maps native high-order incidence structures into the LLM token space through explicit semantic-structural decoupling and bidirectional message passing between vertices and hyperedges. We further define a concrete Hypergraph-as-Language input protocol, which jointly feeds hypergraph tokens and textual prompts into a frozen base LLM, supporting both vertex-level and hyperedge-level tasks under a unified question-answering paradigm. To systematically evaluate different methods in hypergraph structural modeling, we introduce HyperAlign-Bench. Extensive experiments show that Hyper-Align significantly outperforms existing methods across in-domain and zero-shot evaluations.
2605.21858.paper_summary_zh: 大型語言模型（LLMs）最近在建模關係結構方面顯示出強大的潛力。<lb/>然而，現有的方法仍然基本上是以圖為中心：它們專注於將成對的圖結構處理成LLMs可以理解的標記。<lb/>相比之下，許多現實世界的關係模式並不自然符合成對邊的假設，更適合作為高階關聯在超圖中建模。<lb/>對於超圖結構，現有方法往往無法保留多個物體由同一高階關係共同連接的本質語義，限制了它們利用複雜結構的能力。<lb/>為了解決這一限制，我們提出了“超圖作為語言”的觀點，並提出了Hyper-Align，一個針對大型語言模型的超圖原生對齊框架。<lb/>Hyper-Align將以查詢對象為中心的超圖上下文編譯成可被基礎LLM直接消耗的超圖標記。<lb/>具體而言，我們引入了超圖發生詳細模板與概述（HIDT-O），它將高階關聯結構序列化為一個固定形狀的混合模板，結合了局部發生細節和概述級別的摘要。<lb/>然後，我們設計了一個超圖發生投影器（HIP），通過顯式的語義-結構解耦和頂點與超邊之間的雙向消息傳遞，將原生的高階發生結構映射到LLM標記空間。<lb/>我們進一步定義了一個具體的超圖作為語言輸入協議，該協議將超圖標記和文本提示共同輸入到一個凍結的基礎LLM中，支持在統一的問答範式下的頂點級和超邊級任務。<lb/>為了系統地評估超圖結構建模中的不同方法，我們引入了HyperAlign-Bench。<lb/>大量實驗表明，Hyper-Align在領域內和零樣本評估中顯著超越了現有方法。
2605.21858.author: Mengqi Lei et.al.
2605.21858.authors: Mengqi Lei, Guohuan Xie, Shihui Ying, Shaoyi Du, Jun-Hai Yong, Siqi Li, Yue Gao
